title: Surface Relative Threshold Feature
description: Determines whether the provided position is below the estimated surface level of the world, and places a feature if so.

surface_relative_threshold_feature_defin.title: Surface Relative Threshold Feature Definition
surface_relative_threshold_feature_defin.description: A single Surface Relative Threshold Feature Definition.

identifier.description: The identifier for this feature. The identifier must include a namespace and must match the filename.

feature_to_place.description: Reference to the feature to place if position is below surface.

minimum_distance_below_surface.description: Optional. Minimum distance below surface level required for placement.
